untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) 10-candle straight-line upward formation pattern, (2) upward gap (rising window) identification near end of formation, and (3) specific retracement support level at the gap. These require multi-bar pattern recognition and gap detection logic not expressible with single-bar indicators and basic comparison operators. Stop placement and target computation are AUTHOR_SILENT.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture basic uptrend continuation logic (higher highs, bullish candles, retracement exit) but the core pattern recognition (10-bar formation, gap detection, window retracement) requires custom pattern logic beyond allowed indicators.
